title: Joeyan 6 oz Glass Measuring Cups with Spout,Borosilicate Glass Triple Pitcher with Scale,Origami Style Espresso Shot Glasses with Wood Handle for Coffee Milk,Dishwasher Safe
description:
About this item
High Quality Material: Our glass measuring jug made of high borosilicate material, lightweight, anti-corrosion, heating and refrigeration acceptable. And safer than any plastic measuring jug.
V-Shape Water Export: This Spouts Measuring Cup features the V-shape water outlet, which is more convenient than using measuring spoons. It is easy to measure and transport liquid.
With Round Wooden Handles: The Spouts Measuring Cup is featuring an anti-scald wooden handle that is heat insulation and more comfortable to use.
Multi-Purpose: Our measuring jug promotes versatile usage. It can measure everything, perfect for kitchen, home, restaurants. Dishwasher safe, yet best to wash by hand since, over time, dishwashers can affect measurement markers.
Hassle Free Purchase: Joeyan is an honest supplier with reputation. If you have a question, please contact us via "Contact Seller". We will reply within 24 hours, and, we will propose solutions to solve your problem till you are satisfied.
reviews_5s: I bought this product for a gift for a friend who loves making espresso. It is a little larger in size than standard espresso glasses, made of thick, durable glass, and great quality. It is also aesthetically pleasing and works great for making espresso shots. It’s even more beautiful than it looks in the pictures and is a wonderful addition to a coffee lovers coffee bar.This is perfect for making espresso shots, the lip is great for pouring and it is very cute.It is a nice looking jug, perfect for what I needed, but unfortunately I broke it after the third use.I use this every morning to brew my espresso. Great quality, thick glass so it won’t break easy. The size is perfect and has measuring table on the outside. Wooden handle is nice and secure, it’s a must have for me!Perfect size. Good quality.Very cute and aesthetic so you can keep in on the counter without ruining the moodMe gusta el material de buena calidad y también que no se vota al echar el café muy bonito el diseño y prácticaIt’s so cute and works great for my Ninja Luxe cafe!Great addition, best of the best i've found so far!I love this little espresso cup. The ripple detail and wooden handle make it stand out. The glass is good quality and it works perfectly for brewing my espresso.
reviews_1s:
We were so excited to purchase these and have had them about a month and already one has cracked. I loved the look and how the measure the shots, but quality of the product isn’t the best for a busy coffee shop.I recently bought a Breville coffee machine, and this was the perfect size for my double espresso shots. I uses it daily for about 2 weeks before it shattered while I was holding it. I'm not sure why it shattered since it's made for both cold and hot liquids. I was just happy I had already poured out my shots and did not get burned. *Side note: I only used it for my shots and never switched between cold milk and hot shots. I don't know if the one I got was defective, but that was not how I wanted that to end.Washed product upon arrival and when I pulled it out of the dishwasher the handle had come unglued and it fell and broke very disappointingLoved this so much but the glass is way too thin. Already broke and hasn’t even been a month yet.This item is cheaply made and didn’t even last me a month of daily use. It may be nice looking, but won’t last you.Play Video
I was so excited for this ! Disappointed I revived it completely shatteredPut a spoon in it and it knocked out a chunk of glass out. So disappointing!It came broken :(leider kam die Kanne komplett zerstört an… die Kanne war innerhalb des Kartons lediglich mit einer viel zu dünnen Luftpolsterfolie „gesichert“. Diese kann aber niemals die Funktion eines Bruchschutzes darstellen… etwas mehr Mühe beim Verpacken und Versenden würde Ärger ersparen.. ich glaube nämlich die Kanne -sofern selbige heil ankommt- wäre grundsätzlich gut..
